# developer

Software-developer agent — TDD, PR workflow, code review, terminal, on the free chain.

Generated by the hermes-setup configurator — **do not hand-edit**. Regenerate with
`python -m configurator compile developer`.

## Install

```bash
hermes profile install <path-or-git-url> --name developer
```

Fill in the keys listed in `.env.EXAMPLE` (all provider keys are optional — any one yields
a working agent). Then run `hermes -p <profile> config check`.

## Referenced skills (auto-installed on apply)

This distribution authors no skills. The skills below are referenced from trusted
registries and listed machine-readably in `skills.install.json`. The apply flow
(`bootstrap.ps1` / `bootstrap.sh`) auto-runs these — with your confirmation and Hermes'
security scan — so applying the persona lands them installed. To install manually (e.g.
after `hermes profile install`), run:

```bash
hermes skills install official/research/duckduckgo-search
hermes skills tap add obra/superpowers
hermes skills install skills-sh/garrytan/gstack/gstack
```

- `official/research/duckduckgo-search` — Keyless DuckDuckGo web search fallback for the `web` toolset. Official, free to run.
- `obra/superpowers` — TDD / debugging / git / code-review / planning workflows (adds the tap).
- `skills-sh/garrytan/gstack/gstack` — Browser QA, ship, design-review, scrape.
